title: stillingia nutans
intro: Stillingia nutans, also known as Queen's Delight or Spikenard, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its yellow flowers and rhizomatous roots. The plant's roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for medicinal purposes. The health benefits of Stillingia nutans include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and provide relief from symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Stillingia nutans can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
